name: Atos SE
lede: Atos runs seven capability centers across seven Indian cities. Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Tirunelveli, Vadodara, Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering gbs, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atos office in India. We map seven, across seven cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atos SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atos runs 7 verified GCC centers across 7 Indian cities (Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Tirunelveli, Vadodara, Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering gbs. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 91 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Atos operate in India?
faq.a: Atos operates 7 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atos have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Atos's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Tirunelveli, Vadodara, Bengaluru and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Atos run in India?
faq.a: Atos runs gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atos's India GCCs?
faq.a: Atos's India centers employ in the >10K range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atos's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 91 leaders at Atos's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
